name: Blog → Social Posts (AI) — Twitter + LinkedIn → Slack (Free Version)

parameters.content:
## Setup Instructions

### 1. OpenAI API Key
- Go to https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
- Create a new API key
- In n8n: Click the "Generate Social Posts" node → Create New Credential → Paste your API key
- Model: GPT-4o-mini (recommended for free tier)

### 2. RSS Feed URL
- Open the "RSS Feed Trigger" node
- Replace the example URL with your blog's RSS feed
- Common formats: `yourblog.com/feed`, `yourblog.com/rss.xml`, `yourblog.com/blog/rss`

### 3. Slack Credentials
- Create a Slack App at https://api.slack.com/apps with `chat:write` permission
- Install to your workspace and copy the **Bot Token** (starts with xoxb)
- In n8n: Click the Slack node → Create New Credential → Paste token
- Create a channel: `#content`

### 4. Test
- Activate the workflow and publish a blog post to trigger via RSS
- Or temporarily lower the RSS poll interval to test faster
- Verify: Slack message appears in #content with Twitter + LinkedIn posts

**Estimated setup time: 5 minutes**

### Required Credentials
- **OpenAI**: API Key → platform.openai.com/api-keys
- **Slack**: Bot Token → api.slack.com/apps

## Get the Full Version

This free template generates posts for **2 platforms only** (Twitter + LinkedIn).

The full version includes:
- 5 platforms: Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Newsletter
- Manual trigger for on-demand processing
- Duplicate detection (won't reprocess same URL)
- AI fallback (never breaks, even if OpenAI fails)
- Google Sheets content calendar logging
- Buffer integration for scheduled posting
- Centralized error handling with Slack alerts
- Retry logic on all external API calls

Get it at: https://flowyantra.gumroad.com/l/blog-to-social-ai

## How It Works
RSS Trigger detects new blog posts → Fetches full page → Extracts article text → OpenAI generates Twitter thread + LinkedIn post → Sends to Slack for review.

Simple, linear flow. No error handling — upgrade to the full version for production use.

values.content:
You are a social media content strategist. Your job is to repurpose blog posts into platform-optimized social media content.

Rules:
1. Match the tone and voice of the original blog post
2. Each platform post must feel native to that platform
3. Twitter: concise, max 280 chars per tweet. Create a thread of 3-5 tweets.
4. LinkedIn: professional, insight-driven, 150-300 words. Use line breaks.
5. Include relevant hashtags (5-8 per platform)
6. Include an engagement hook at the start
7. Include the blog post URL naturally

Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No markdown, no code fences.

parameters.jsCode:
// Format Slack message with Twitter + LinkedIn posts
const data = $input.item.json;
const tweets = Array.isArray(data.twitter_thread) ? data.twitter_thread.join('
---
') : data.twitter_thread;
const hashtags = data.hashtags || {};

const msg = `:memo: *New Social Posts Generated*

`
  + `*Blog:* <${data.url}|${data.title}>

`
  + `---
`
  + `*Twitter Thread:*
${tweets}
`
  + (hashtags.twitter?.length ? `_Hashtags: ${hashtags.twitter.join(' ')}_
` : '')
  + `
---
`
  + `*LinkedIn:*
${data.linkedin_post}
`
  + (hashtags.linkedin?.length ? `_Hashtags: ${hashtags.linkedin.join(' ')}_
` : '')
  + `
---
`
  + `_Generated by Blog to Social Posts (Free) — Upgrade for 5 platforms + scheduling_`;

return { json: { slack_message: msg } };
